ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "economy_classification" TEXT /* Economy classification of the country (e.g., UMI, LMI, HI) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population size of the country */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Healthcare spending in the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for further inquiries */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitation service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitation service (e.g., Inpatient, Home rehab, Community rehab) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the rehabilitation service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population covered by the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehabilitation_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economy classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the economy classification (e.g., UMI, LMI, HI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pillar_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pillar score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country with the pillar score */,
  "pillar_score" REAL /* Pillar score of the country */,
  "pillar_name" TEXT /* Name of the pillar (e.g., Access, Quality, Efficiency) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the score (e.g., survey, report) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pillar_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_services" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the education service (e.g., Education on managing, Education on safety) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the education service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education service */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the education service (e.g., patients, caregivers) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the education is provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the education service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the education service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the education service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "early_rehab_services" (
  "early_rehab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each early rehab service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the early rehab service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the early rehab service */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Age group targeted by the early rehab service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the early rehab service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the early rehab service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the early rehab service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the early rehab service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("early_rehab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_rehab_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_services" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the protocol service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protocol service */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or guideline the protocol follows */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the protocol service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the protocol service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inhospital_rehab_services" (
  "inhospital_rehab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inhospital rehab service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the inhospital rehab service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the inhospital rehab service */,
  "average_stay_days" TEXT /* Average number of days patients stay in the hospital */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the inhospital rehab service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the inhospital rehab service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the inhospital rehab service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the inhospital rehab service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inhospital_rehab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inhospital_rehab_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outpatient_rehab_services" (
  "outpatient_rehab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outpatient rehab service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country offering the service */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the outpatient rehab service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outpatient rehab service */,
  "average_session_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of each outpatient session */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the outpatient rehab service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the outpatient rehab service was first offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the outpatient rehab service was last offered or discontinued */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the outpatient rehab service data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outpatient_rehab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outpatient_rehab_services_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
